children.text: insofar as such reference relates to any function or authority transferred under , shall be deemed to refer to the Secretary of State;section 6562(a) of this title

insofar as such reference relates to any function or authority transferred under , shall be deemed to refer to the Administrator of the Agency for International Development;section 6562(b) of this title

insofar as such reference relates to any function or authority transferred under , shall be deemed to refer to the head of the agency to which such function or authority is transferred under such section; andsection 6562(c) of this title

insofar as such reference relates to any function or authority not transferred by this subchapter, shall be deemed to refer to the President or such agency or agencies as may be specified by Executive order.
